atoms.claim: Qualified principals, canonical Workspace topology, strict capability data, and collision-free authority keys are codec-complete.
Only trust-revision- and expiry-bound token/callback verification materializes guest Grants; elevated allows are removed, denies retained, and trust revocation closes materialized authority.
Tenant runtime derives topology, direct/team/foreign subject closure, Grant lineage, deny precedence, and current path epochs from owned stores and emits complete typed evidence.
Workspace Bindings and invocation-owner watermarks have codec-identical memory and file-backed SQLite behavior, monotonic revisions, restart recovery, and projection validation.

W2 operational failures use the closed AgentCoreError taxonomy, constructor and codec shape failures remain typed shape failures, durable records use static codecs and immutable behavior-carrying states, and memory/SQLite recovery rejects malformed ownership closure.
